Description: The {model} energy of the highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO).
The {model} energy of the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO).
The {model} electric dipole moment, magnitude of the dipole vector.
The {model} gradients of the energy with respect to the atomic coordinates.
The {model} standard entropy at the chosen temperature and pressure.
The {model} Gibbs free energy at the chosen temperature and pressure.
